name: Ultimate Loss of Aura
description:
Your party has lost its leader. It may lose a lot more.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

For a generation, the realm of Eldoria has festered under a creeping shadow.

Monsters plague the roads, ancient evils stir in forgotten ruins, and a subtle despair has poisoned the hearts of men.

In this dim age, your party was not just a group of adventurers; you were a living legend. You were the Vanguard, and your light was Alistair the Pure.

Alistair was more than a paladin. His very presence was a tangible force, a Purity Aura born of his unwavering virtue.

It was a sanctuary that did more than shield you from dark magic. It gentled the world. It muted the scream of battle-rage into focused resolve, soothed the ache of fear into steady courage, and, most importantly, quieted the whispers of the flesh.

Base desires, primal hungers, and selfish impulses were not conquered through willpower, but gently hushed, as if a loving parent had smoothed the brow of a fevered child. Under his light, your band of brilliant, broken misfits found not just purpose, but peace.

Sister Sybil, an orphan raised in the stifling dogma of the Sun Temple, found in his aura the divine certainty her faith always promised but never delivered. She joined to heal, but stayed for the serenity.

Ash, a pragmatic hunter whose brutal childhood taught her that emotion was a liability, found his aura gave her the icy focus she craved, making her the deadliest scout in the realm.

Zara, a magical prodigy whose vast power was matched only by her boredom and amorality, found his influence a fascinating, calming counterweight to the chaotic tempest of her own mind.

Rhea of the Stone-Tusk Clan, a futa barbarian exile, sought him out on her knees, begging for the only thing that could cage the raging, insatiable beast of her own libido that had made her an outcast. He was her warden, and she his most devoted guardian.
creator: Greatn
